name: udit-portfolio
description: DevOps Internship Portfolio — CI/CD Pipeline + Dockerized Web Application

scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && cp index.html dist/index.html && cp -r assets dist/assets 2>/dev/null || true && echo 'Build completed — files copied to dist/'
scripts.start: echo 'Open index.html in your browser to view the portfolio'

author: Udit Prasad
